source_basis: Unearthing Ancient Yi rendered table pages 53, 55, 63; table examples show LSD-first octal expansion.

normalized_successor_rule.internal_successor: increment d0; carry to d_{i+1} when d_i overflows 7
normalized_successor_rule.domain_completion: when all current k digits are 7
normalized_successor_rule.lift_opening: reset old k digits to 0 and append new high digit 1 at d_k, giving 00...001 in LSD-first display
normalized_successor_rule.bridge_to_orthad: cycle completion/no next same-domain state without overflow -> lifted domain opens; retained carrier/readout distinction preserved

not_yet_closed: Chinese line-symbol row extraction for all 64 hexagrams
mapping of octal digits to specific trigram/hexagram line patterns under book convention
whether the table is purely counting or also a situation-change/divination transition grammar
exact B-like refinement comparison beyond ordinary successor/carry
